look.text: A jacket with a plaid so aggressive it files a grievance of its own. You cannot imagine why you bought it. The store, however, can be reminded that you did.
Proof of purchase. The single most powerful document a man can hold, and you nearly threw it out with the pizza box.
A whole marble rye. Dense, seeded, historic. Kessler has been talking about this exact loaf for a week and a half.
It opens. It does not close. It is, functionally, a small permanent weather system you carry by the neck.
A pen that clicks with a satisfaction wildly out of proportion to anything it will ever write. You could click this pen for a living.
